mapper.sql: id, vin, batch_num, preset_state, kms_provider, kms_key_ref, key_spec, algorithm, kcv, fail_reason, gen_time, last_attempt_time, constant_type, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_veh_security_constant ( id, vin, batch_num, preset_state, kms_provider, kms_key_ref, key_spec, algorithm, kcv, fail_reason, gen_time, last_attempt_time, constant_type, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{vin}, #{batchNum}, #{presetState}, #{kmsProvider}, #{kmsKeyRef}, #{keySpec}, #{algorithm}, #{kcv}, #{failReason}, #{genTime}, #{lastAttemptTime}, #{constantType}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_veh_security_constant t SET
t.vin = #{vin},
t.batch_num = #{batchNum},
t.preset_state = #{presetState},
t.kms_provider = #{kmsProvider},
t.kms_key_ref = #{kmsKeyRef},
t.key_spec = #{keySpec},
t.algorithm = #{algorithm},
t.kcv = #{kcv},
t.fail_reason = #{failReason},
t.gen_time = #{genTime},
t.last_attempt_time = #{lastAttemptTime},
t.constant_type = #{constantType},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_veh_security_constant t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_veh_security_constant t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_veh_security_constant t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT FROM tb_veh_security_constant t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
ORDER BY t.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_veh_security_constant t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_veh_security_constant t WHERE t.vin = #{vin}
